title: Tiago de Paula BJJ – Brazilian Jiu Jitsu
text: Schedule Skip to content TIAGO DE PAULA BRAZILIAN JIU JITSU Pricing WELCOME Tiago de Paula BJJ was founded in Zurich in 2017 with a mission to provide high-quality Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu training in a friendly and familiar atmosphere. The dojos in Zurich and in the Silver Coast offer a variety of classes tailored whether you’re a beginner looking to get in shape or an experienced practitioner aiming for competition success, we have the perfect program for you: Group Classes: Dynamic adult and children’s classes focusing on fitness, technique, and overall well-being. Private Classes: One-on-one sessions tailored to your unique needs and goals. Competition Training: Specialized training to prepare you for major BJJ tournaments worldwide. Kids’ Programs: Fun-filled birthday parties and engaging camps during school breaks to spark a lifelong love for BJJ. Head Professor and Founder Tiago de Paula, the founder and head coach of Tiago de Paula BJJ, brings an extensive experience and dedication to the art of Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu. Originally from Brazil, Tiago has made Switzerland his home since 2014, and his journey in BJJ began as a personal quest for fitness and well-being. Now a black belt under Felipe Broa (Carlson Gracie Zurich), Tiago is committed to sharing his expertise and love for BJJ with students of all ages and levels. His energetic personality and continuous pursuit of excellence make him an inspiring leader in the BJJ community. WE OFFER BJJ FOR ADULTS BJJ FOR KIDS BJJ FOR WOMEN BJJ KIDS CAMP BIRTHDAY PARTY Posted on Google Ruben Crawford Trustindex verifies that the original source of the review is Google. Tiago is such a great guy. Love his Training for myself and can't wait till my little one is old enough to train with him too! Biggest recommendation if you wanna learn the art of BJJ from a legit black belt in a super relaxed, family-like environment 💪❤️ Posted on Google Thomas Davies Trustindex verifies that the original source of the review is Google. I dropped in to Tiago's academy when I was visiting Zurich recently, and I'd highly recommend it. Everyone was very friendly and welcoming, including the instructors (Tiago and Raquel) who were extremely knowledgable and great teachers. I hope to visit again in the future! Posted on Google Behnaz Kamyab Trustindex verifies that the original source of the review is Google. Tiago ist ein sehr geduldiger und guter Trainer! Er hat immer ein offenes Ohr und supportet uns wo es geht! Ich liebe die Kampfschule! Posted on Google Matyas Labussiere Trustindex verifies that the original source of the review is Google. Der Professor Tiago sind unglaublich talentiert und besitzen eine spezielle Fähigkeit ihr wissen an die Studenten weiterzugeben. Die Schule hat sehr gute Trainingsparnter und super gute Vibes Die beste BJJ-Akademie in Zürich! Posted on Google Alexander Brunner Trustindex verifies that the original source of the review is Google. Tiago and his team are great teachers. The gym has a super friendly and inspiring atmosphere combined with a healthy competitive spirit. The classes are well mixed and the kids classes are great! Posted on Google Antoine Fabri Trustindex verifies that the original source of the review is Google. I've trained for a week (4 evening classes) at Tiago's dojo. Tiago started his dojo teaching to kids only and later started to teach adults, I've seen him interact with them and it's obvious he loves them very much and they have a lot of fun. He's also very proud of them and their great competition results. The gym is quite small, I would say we were about 15 per class and filling up the space well, white and blue, all ages with somewhat of a gap in the 20-30 range (I assumed it was because the gym developed from the kid's parents). The atmosphere is very familial and chill (they self describe as family orientated), all my training partners were very respectful and welcoming. Tiago is really a great guy with a super positive attitude, you cannot dislike him, the classes are a fun time. The classes are given in English, we start with a warmup given by a student while presumably Tiago takes a break (he has a tight schedule with many classes and private lessons), jumping around, running, high knees, pushups, 10 min max, then the technique, sometimes positional sparring in theking of the hill format then 2 or 3 3 minute rolls (on the Friday we did 3 or 4 5 min rolls). All week we studied the same main moves, single leg take down, and a sequence switching between different guards, + some guard passing drills and a sub from side control on the Friday. Tiago gave me more personal attention than I'd expect as a visitor and his input was very valuable, he offered me a roll on my last lesson too. I liked the possibility to train in the gi every week evening, didn't try no gi but I saw 3 or 4 tall jacked dude coming out of it so I expect the rolls to be challenging! I recommend the gym, especially for kids and older beginners that have some apprehension towards this beautiful sport. Posted on Google Ben Robson Trustindex verifies that the original source of the review is Google. What a great academy. The atmosphere and coaching here is one of the best I have visited. Anyone looking to train would be at a disservice by not attending classes here. Posted on Google Dario Wernet Trustindex verifies that the original source of the review is Google. Sehr guter Trainer für Erwachsene und Kinder. Tiago führt das Dojo mit viel Herz und Erfahrung. Team und Stimmung sind sehr familiär! BJJ KIDS CAMP Join Us for Our Exciting Kids BJJ Camps! Looking for a fun and active way to spend your child's vacation? Our Kids BJJ camps are the perfect solution! Enjoy intense BJJ training, followed by outdoor fun and games or exciting indoor activities. Our camps are open to members and non-members alike, and they take place during the last week of the spring, summer, and autumn school breaks in Zurich. Camp Details: Time: 9 AM - 12 PM Location: Ou
